Size guide

Storage Near Washington, DC 20002

Self storage in Northeast Washington is conveniently located along Bladensburg Road NE, near U.S. Route 50 and within easy reach of New York Avenue and the Baltimore-Washington Parkway.

Small Storage Units Near You in Northeast Washington

Commuters, frequent travelers, and professionals working near Ivy City, H Street NE, or the Union Market area can store personal items, work supplies, or seasonal gear in a 5x5 storage unit. These compact spaces are well-suited for boxes, files, small furniture, sports equipment, and items that no longer fit comfortably in a condo or apartment.

Families and residents throughout Northeast DC can use a 5x10 storage unit to create more space in their homes. These units work well for strollers, folding chairs, coolers, luggage, holiday decorations, off-season clothing, and extra household items that tend to take over closets and hallways.

Medium Storage Units Near You in Northeast Washington

Apartment and condo residents near Brookland, Trinidad, or along Bladensburg Road can store duplicate or bulky furniture in a 10x10 storage unit. Sofas, coffee tables, dining sets, shelving, and extra kitchen items fit comfortably, making these units helpful during moves, downsizing, or home refresh projects.

Large Storage Units Near You in Northeast Washington

A 10x15 storage unit provides added flexibility for larger household and recreational items. These units can hold bicycles, mattresses, larger furniture pieces, and multiple rooms’ worth of belongings, along with storage bins and seasonal gear that need to remain accessible year-round.

Homeowners in Northeast Washington, Brentwood, and surrounding neighborhoods planning a renovation or transitioning between homes can store the contents of multiple rooms in a 10x20 or 10x25 storage unit. These spacious units can hold furniture, appliances, boxes, and decor from a three-bedroom home, making them a practical option while remodeling, relocating, or organizing long-term storage near Bladensburg Road.

After stopping by your unit, unwind with a walk through the nearby U.S. National Arboretum, or head toward the shops and dining along H Street NE, both just a short drive from Bladensburg Road.

Use our eRental program to book a contactless move-in and enjoy modern self storage that's built for your needs.

If you are still looking for storage units near you in 20002, we have locations on 1230 South Capitol St SE, Washington, DC 20003, and 4301 Rhode Island Ave, Brentwood, MD 20722.

At Public Storage, You'll Always Find...

Convenient Storage Solutions

Keypad Access

Moving Supplies Available

Free Parking

Well-Lit Facilities

Convenient Self Storage Near You in Northeast Washington

Looking for storage that fits seamlessly into your daily routine? Our Northeast Washington location makes it easy to stop by before work or after errands. Declutter your home or office without going out of your way.

Available Storage Unit Sizes

From compact locker units designed for boxes and seasonal items to larger spaces that can hold furniture and household belongings, there’s a size to match your situation. Choose the right amount of space so you can organize efficiently without paying for more room than you need.

Drive-Up Access

Why carry heavy items farther than you have to? Drive-up access allows you to pull your vehicle directly up to your unit, making loading and unloading faster and more convenient. It’s a practical option for bulky furniture, equipment, and frequent visits.

Climate-Controlled Storage

Climate-controlled units provide a more consistent environment for items affected by temperature changes. These spaces are commonly used for electronics, wood furniture, and seasonal clothing that benefit from added care during storage.

Uncovered Parking

Need a place to keep an extra vehicle out of the driveway? Uncovered parking offers a simple solution for storing cars, trucks, or trailers when space at home is limited. It’s a convenient way to free up room without committing to long-term garage storage.

Covered Parking

Covered parking helps shield vehicles from sun, rain, and snow. This option works well if you want some coverage from the elements while still maintaining easy access.

Enclosed Parking

Enclosed parking provides a fully contained space for vehicles or equipment that need added separation from outdoor conditions. These units are ideal for long-term storage or when you want everything kept in one enclosed area.

24/7 Access Storage Near You

With 24/7 access options, you can retrieve or store items early in the morning, late at night, or whenever it fits your routine. This flexibility is especially helpful for busy households and business storage needs.

Other Amenities & Services

Additional features help simplify your storage experience from move-in to move-out. Well-lit areas, convenient access points, and available moving supplies make it easier to organize, transport, and store your belongings.

Cheap Self Storage in Northeast Washington

Finding affordable storage doesn’t mean sacrificing convenience or flexibility. Budget-friendly options allow you to store your items while keeping monthly costs manageable, whether you’re downsizing, relocating, or reorganizing your space.

Promotions

Take advantage of special offers available for new customers. Promotions vary by location and season, so check our current rates online or speak with our on-site team to learn about any active discounts that could save you money on your storage rental.

Billing (how it works)

Managing your payments is simple and flexible. Customers can make one-time payments or set up automatic monthly payments through their online account. Your account also lets you update payment information and view billing history at any time.

On-Site Property Manager

Our experienced property managers are here to assist you every step of the way. From helping you select the perfect unit size to answering questions about access and amenities, our professional team is committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your storage experience is smooth and stress-free.

Directions

Directions from the North

Drive south on Rhode Island Avenue NE toward Mount Rainier and Brentwood. Turn left onto Bladensburg Road NE and continue south for about one mile. The facility at 1618 Bladensburg Road NE will be on your right.

Directions from the South

Drive north on New York Avenue NE (U.S. Route 50). Take the exit for Bladensburg Road NE and turn right onto Bladensburg Road. Continue for several blocks, and the facility will be on your left just past Montello Avenue NE.

Directions from the East

Drive west on U.S. Route 50/New York Avenue NE. Take the Bladensburg Road NE exit and turn right onto Bladensburg Road. Continue south a short distance, and the facility will be on your left.

Directions from the West

Drive east on Florida Avenue NE toward New York Avenue. Turn left onto Bladensburg Road NE and continue north. The facility at 1618 Bladensburg Road NE will be on your right shortly after passing Montello Avenue NE.

Find us near Bladensburg Road NE and Montello Avenue NE.

  • Month-to-Month Rent

Explore our Washington, DC Storage Units at Bladensburg Road NE

Self Storage FAQs

Self-storage prices vary by location, unit size, features, and availability. Smaller units typically cost less than larger ones, and indoor and climate-controlled units may be priced differently than standard units. Public Storage offers month-to-month rentals, so you only pay for the time you need.

Specials vary by location and unit type, so checking current rates and promotions in your area is the best way to find the most up-to-date offers.

Start by taking inventory of what you plan to store and how often you'll need to access it. A small 5x5 unit often fits boxes or small household items, while medium sizes like 10x10 work well for multiple rooms' worth of belongings. Larger units, such as 10x20 or 10x30, are designed for bigger items or business needs.

Indoor Storage Units: Located inside a building with hallway access.

Outdoor Drive-Up Units: Ground-level units you can drive up to for quick loading and unloading.

Climate-Controlled Units: Designed to help maintain more consistent temperature and humidity levels. Availability varies by location.

Vehicle Storage: Options may include parking spaces or enclosed units for cars or small trailers.

RV or Boat Storage: Typically offered as open or covered parking spaces at select locations.

Business Storage: Units suited for storing inventory, equipment, or supplies without the cost of commercial property.

Features and availability vary by facility.

Climate-controlled storage helps maintain more consistent temperature and humidity levels inside the unit. It's commonly used for items like books, fabrics, electronics, or other belongings that can react to extreme heat, cold, or humidity. Climate-controlled storage is available at many—but not all—locations, so availability depends on the facility.

Drive-up access refers to a ground-level storage unit that you can pull your vehicle right up to. This makes loading and unloading quicker because you don't need to use hallways, elevators, or stairs. It's often chosen for storing larger items or boxes you'll want to move in and out easily.

Some storage facilities offer 24/7 access as an added feature, while others provide extended access hours. Availability varies by property, so it's best to check your location's access hours when renting a unit.

Common security features include:
• Gated access with individualized entry codes
• Bright lighting throughout the property
• Onsite staff during office hours
• Video surveillance
• Well-maintained fencing and facility grounds
• Storage unit locks available for purchase

Features can vary widely by location, so reviewing your facility's offerings is recommended.

Convenience depends on your needs, but many renters prefer:
• Drive-up units for fast loading
• Indoor units for hallway access and comfortable entry
• 24/7 access where available
• Month-to-month rentals
• Locations near home, work, or major roads
• Online account management and payment options

Public Storage maintains facilities with routine property checks, regular cleaning of common areas, and ongoing pest-control efforts. We also provide clean, well-kept hallways and entry points, and staff monitor the property throughout the week.

If you've never rented self storage before, we're here to help.

May 10, 2026
Google Public Storage Danielle Waldrop
Carla provided absolutely outstanding customer service at Public Storage. From the moment I walked in, she was professional, patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely helpful. She took the time to answer every question, explained the rental process clearly, and made everything smooth and stress-free. It’s rare to find someone who truly cares about customers the way Carla does. Her positive attitude and attention to detail made the entire in experience excellent. The facility was clean, organized, and well-managed, which reflects her dedication and hard work. If you’re looking for storage and want exceptional service, ask for Carla — she goes above and beyond. Highly recommended! ::::

Carla was the bomb dot com she was very helpful and understanding. This was my first time using a storage service and she made me feel like a pro.

You have to check them out ask for Carla when you get there she was awesome and very sweet.Great personality and very Professional.OH

Thank you so much.It was a great experience.I forgot your name deleted in the front desk.With the glasses and the short hair.You are really a blessing.Thank you so much to make this easy for me.God bless you and I definitely reference in front of you guys.Public storage the best

Ms Carla has excellent customer service she was very helpful patient and explain every question that I had to ask

With love to Public Storage for your love and compassion for great service, understanding and embracing the customers concerns. A very clean unit space. And best Customer service ever. Thank you caring and paying attention to us. Michelle and team.

Amazing service I request that Carla deserves a raise in pay.

Google Public Storage Ivyona Graham
I was new in town looking for somewhere to store my stuff before I move in my new home the front Dess lady name Sam was a great help. I recommend anyone who is in that area to go there and ask for Sam. She was very respectful, very reasonable with the prices also, she made me feel very at home

Great customer service! Clean, friendly. I just came in for some information about the storage. The employees were very friendly & warming! Thank you

I was new in town and I stop to inquire about a unit and the nice young lady name Sam was very respectful and helpful with all my needs so very nice in my opinion if anyone goes there ask for Sam she will be very helpful

I was at Public storage today on Bladensburg and India was at services today! Outside cleaning up the leaves. October 10, 2023
Google Public Storage Kelli M
There are not many Publuc storage facilities in D.C. I visited the Bladensburg rd facility for storage information and the young lady there was very helpful and knowledgeable of what public storage offers and told me how to get the better rates whether it was online or at one of the other facilities. I would recommend public storage for your storage needs.
September 11, 2023
Google Public Storage Doniece Moore
Once, I came in Public Storage having many questions, India had answered every one of them respectfully not knowing she was the property manger and gave the upmost respect to made me feel comfortable even with her property being very nice and clean. India was very helpful, I will storage here.

March 7, 2022
Google Public Storage Chip Frye
March 1, 2022
Google Public Storage Dell
I had a great experience with this facility. Carla was professional and efficient. I received a call when I made a reservation online and again before my move-in. I like that security is paramount; codes are utilized for entrance into the main door and again for entering the units. Additionally, access is only permitted during operating hours and an associate is on -site. There is no access after business hours. The units are clean, hallways free of debris and well lit. I encourage future customers to do their part by picking-up after yourselves in the parking lot.
February 9, 2022
Google Public Storage LaTear Brinson
Nice environment very clean.
February 4, 2022
Google Public Storage fatima Makenta Ruffin
I loved working with Carla and Donna they made the experience so smooth, it was effortless and easy to setup, providing lots of information within that one setting to get the ball rolling for a new storage unit. They are so personable and willing to assist to answer all questions. The location is clean and using the mobile app was awesome!
February 3, 2022

By checking this box, you consent to our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and consent to receive automated transactional calls and text alerts from Public Storage.

Promotion

Subject to change. Offered only on select units at select locations. Limit one offer per household. This offer applies only to the rental fee. Other restrictions, taxes, and fees, including a $29 administrative fee, apply. See Rental Agreement for full details. Not available on transfers or additional spaces. Reservation required to guarantee price. Actual unit sizes may vary from approximate size estimates and reservations do not guarantee unit availability. Please inspect any unit before renting. Online pricing available only for online reservations and rentals.

Not sure about the size you need? Don’t worry, the online pricing discount will be honored for any rental originating from an online reservation. If the promotion is associated with the Memorial Day Sale: the promotional period is for a limited time only and you must move in within 7 days of reservation.

Public Storage is the leading provider of storage units for your personal, business and vehicle needs with thousands of locations nationwide. We offer a wide variety of units and sizes available with no obligation and no long-term commitment. Call today at 800-688-8057 for a free reservation and get your first month's rent for just $1.

Public Storage Locations in San Antonio:

  • Converse, Texas
  • Universal City, Texas
  • Helotes, Texas
  • Live Oak, Texas
  • La Marque, Texas
  • Missouri City, Texas
  • Manvel, Texas
  • Dickinson, Texas

PUBLIC STORAGE, PS, and the Orange Door Trade Dress are trademarks or registered trademarks of Public Storage in the United States and/or other countries.

Facilities with a have one or more of the following sustainable initiatives in place to help you make an informed storage decision: LED lighting, Efficient HVAC Systems, Solar power generation, Eco-Friendly Water Practices, or High R-value Insulation.

Promotion: Subject to change. Offered only on selected units. Subject to availability. Limit one offer per household. This offer applies only to the rental fee. Other restrictions, taxes, and fees, including an administrative fee, apply. See contract for full details. Promotions good for new customers only. Not available on transfers or additional spaces. Pricing subject to change. Reservation required to guarantee price. Actual unit sizes may vary from approximate size estimate and reservations do not guarantee unit availability. Online pricing available only for online reservations and rentals. Not sure about the size you need? Don’t worry, online pricing discount will be honored for any rental originating from an online reservation. If the promotion is associated with the Memorial Day Sale: the promotional period is for a limited time only and you must move in within 7 days of reservation.

Climate-controlled: Features and amenities vary by location, facility, and unit. “Climate-controlled” and related terms (such as air-conditioned, heated, or humidistat-equipped) describe storage spaces designed to help maintain more consistent temperature or humidity levels compared to non-climate-controlled units. Public Storage does not guarantee temperature or humidity ranges. Availability, features, and unit types may differ by location, facility, and unit. Please confirm with your facility whether specific climate-controlled features are available on units at that location.

Promotion

Subject to change. Offered only on select units at select locations. Limit one offer per household. This offer applies only to the rental fee. Other restrictions, taxes, and fees, including a $29 administrative fee, apply. See Rental Agreement for full details. Not available on transfers or additional spaces. Reservation required to guarantee price. Actual unit sizes may vary from approximate size estimates and reservations do not guarantee unit availability. Please inspect any unit before renting. Online pricing available only for online reservations and rentals.

Not sure about the size you need? Don’t worry, the online pricing discount will be honored for any rental originating from an online reservation. If the promotion is associated with the Memorial Day Sale: the promotional period is for a limited time only and you must move in within 7 days of reservation.
